title: Diligence Preparation in Practice
shortSummary: Build stronger diligence preparation in practice judgment so capital / fundraising work becomes clearer, more repeatable, and easier to lead.
whyItMatters: Diligence Preparation in Practice is a leverage point inside capital / fundraising. It supports the broader goal of fundraising, capital allocation, investor relations, and financial strategy.
coreConcepts: Diligence Preparation in Practice needs clear definitions before it can become a reliable operating system.
Good diligence preparation in practice work depends on better signal, better sequencing, and cleaner ownership.
Diligence Preparation in Practice should reduce rework and improve the quality of decisions across the business.
